package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_hassuffix_then_trimsuffix: `if strings.HasSuffix(s, p) { s = strings.TrimSuffix(s, p) }`
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario657Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.HasSuffix(haystack, needle)
}
